title: Import Merge Columns in Mailchimp Integration from Monday Board Columns
excerpt: Description: Currently, the Mailchimp integration with Monday.com only allows for the import of email addresses from the Monday board. Our team has additional columns, such as first name and last name, that we would like…

posts.author: alexisrb (Alexis )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description: Currently, the Mailchimp integration with Monday.com only allows for the import of email addresses from the Monday board. Our team has additional columns, such as first name and last name, that we would like to import into Mailchimp alongside the email addresses.

Current Limitation: Only email addresses are imported from Monday.com to Mailchimp. Other relevant data, such as first and last names, are not transferred, resulting in incomplete subscriber information.

Feature Request: Enhance the Mailchimp integration to support the import of additional columns (merge fields) from Monday.com. Specifically, we need the ability to map and import fields like first name and last name into Mailchimp.

Suggested Solution: Update the integration settings to allow users to select and map additional columns from the Monday board to corresponding merge fields in Mailchimp during the import process.

Benefits:

  • Provides complete subscriber information in Mailchimp
  • Enhances personalization and segmentation capabilities in Mailchimp
  • Reduces manual data entry and improves workflow efficiency
  • Ensures consistency and accuracy of contact data across platforms

Thank you for considering this enhancement to improve the functionality of the Mailchimp integration with Monday.com.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @alexisrb

We developed an app called Mailchimp Integration Plus that provides a robust integration with Mailchimp. Amongst other capabilities, it allows to do full mapping of fields from monday to Mailchimp, including custom fields for merge tags. Here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-05-13 at 12.17.122714×1440 269 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @alexisrb,

If you’re still looking for another solution on this, you can now integrate Mailchimp into monday using the Data Importer monday app.

A few things you can do with Mailchimp using Data Importer:

  • Bulk import your entire contact list from an audience.
  • Import various contact fields (e.g. name, email, status & custom merge fields) and stats (e.g. average open rate)
  • Schedule imports to keep your monday board in sync when new contacts are added to Mailchimp.

I’ve also created a step-by-step tutorial for more details on how to import Mailchimp contacts

Screenshot 2025-03-16 at 19.47.541992×1084 141 KB
